titleStmt.title: SII 31.26: original edition by C. A. Padmanabha Sastri and T. S. Ravishankar
No. 26. (A.R. No. B 295 of 1937.) BHAṬṬIPRŌLU, REPALLE TALUK, GUNTUR DISTRICT.

summary.p: On the second pillar inside the kalyāṇa maṇḍapa of Viṭṭhalēśvarasvāmi temple.
The record is dated in Śaka 11[60], Viḷambi, Āśvayuja, ba. 3, Tuesday, Tulāsankrāṅti regularly corresponding to September 28, 1238 A.D.

Records that toll-officer (śunkādhikāri) Maṇḍaya, son of Malle[pe]ggaḍa gifted 3 kēsari gadya per year derived from the government income (rācha śuṁkamu), for the supply of ghee at the rate of one nandi mānika per day and also for about a year for maintenance of the perpetual lamp daily in the temple of Bhōgīśvara mahādēva at Bhaṭṭiprōlu. The gift is said to have been for the prosperity of Gaṇapatidēva mahādēva, and entrusted to the pūjāris of the temple for the maintenance.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti . śrī śakava¨rṣaṁbulu
1190 nēṁṭi viḷaṁbi sa
ṁvatsara [Āsva(śva)]yuja ba
3 maṁgaḷā (ḷa) vāramu nāṁ
ḍu tulāsaṁ kātti nimi
ttamuna śrīmanmahā maṁ
ḍalēśvarakākeka(ti) gaṇapa
tidēvamahārājula su
ṁkkādhikāri mallepe
ggaḍla koḍuku maṁḍḍaya
gaṇapati dēvamahārā
ku dha¨rmmuvugā

nubhaṭṭiprōli śrībhōgīśva
ra mahādēvaraku Akhaṁ
ḍapa¨rtti dīpamunaku naṁ
di mānika nityamāneṁ
ḍu nētilekkanu Īstala
muna rācasuṁkkamu
lōnu Ēṁṭikiṁ gēsa
ri gadyalu 3 Īpahi
ṁ ṭīgoni pūjārulu
Ācaṁdrā¨rkkamu naḻa
paṁ galavāru .
Digital edition of SII 31.26 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
